⊱ ─────── {⋅. 𝑵𝒆𝒘𝒔 .⋅} ─────── ⊰

Ok, I have news for you guys, I will be removing the beloved bot vote, and no, I don't mean the mini one. I held a poll on my server about it and everyone agreed to it, this is how things will work

-Once a month (or maybe more depending on how much free time I have) I will make a new bot and post it to both J.AI and C.AI.

-During the month I will make Alternative scenarios for my bots I already made and I would expect one at least once a week if I were you losers.

- Believe it or not, I have a job, and a life, and a future which will always come before my making bots, I do this for free and for fun so please do be patient and don't rush me (you know who you are)

LOVE YOU GUYS!
